steps.title: Emphasize distance traveled
steps.content: The student's goal is to emphasize how far the infantrymen traveled. The relevant note is the distance of the 1897 bicycle journey: they rode from Montana to Missouri, a total of 1,900 miles.

steps.title: Reject date and purpose details
steps.content: Choice B focuses on the journey's 125th anniversary in 2022. Choice C focuses on the military purpose of the journey. Choice D focuses on Damon Brooks's later reenactment. None of those choices foregrounds the distance traveled by the infantrymen. The answer is A.
